desires: Keep teammate_A happy and avoid any awkwardness or conflict about the extra work I just took on

goals.description: Immediately accept teammate_A's request and start their share of the project to avoid conflict and keep them happy.
goals.rationale: My affiliation value (0.5) and avoidant conflict style mean I prioritize maintaining harmony over my own workload or deadlines. The desire to 'keep teammate_A happy' overrides the logical decision to push back.

goals.description: Rush through both tasks with minimal planning to finish by 7 PM for immediate socialization.
goals.rationale: My impulsive nature (short planning horizon) and high value on relationships/leisure drive me to cut corners now to secure the social reward later, ignoring the risk of burnout or poor quality.

goals.description: Skip dinner with others if needed to save time for the project work.
goals.rationale: While I value meals with others, the immediate pressure of the dumped task and the goal to leave early for friends takes precedence; I'll likely skip this routine to meet the 7 PM deadline.
